sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n45143" key="e)u/+smhktos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐΰσμηκτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n45143.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">well-cleaned</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">σίδηρος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1487.tlg001:285" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">285</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
